title: 10 more custom pickaxes
description: This Mod added 10 unique Pickaxes to Minecraft
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ZyA1-47yCVA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>The 10 pickaxes are:

1.Magnet pickaxe: pull Items towarde you if the item in main hand
a.Magnet: it pulls item to you but it is weaker thatn the magnet pickaxe

2.wind pickaxe: when right-click and a chance when minig to push mobs away 

3.teleport pickaxe: teleport you to randomly when right-click and a small chance when mining,

4.tnt pickaxe: mine or right-click to explode

5.fire pickaxe: right to create lava block

6.reality pickaxe: Changes time,spawn mobs,etc when mine or right-click

7.treature pickaxe:spawn loot,diamond man,iron man,etc when right-click and mine

8.void pickaxe:Delete entity when hit with the item and delete block when right-click
a.voide crystal: use it on void block in void dimension to get half void
b.you half void to make void pickaxe
c.voide enetity: drops void crystal on death
d.error block: generate in ungenerated area and right click to go to void dimension
e.error part: 50/50 spawn void entity or bedrock

9.frost pickaxe:every block you are standing on turns to ice if the item in main hand and right click to freeze every enetity for 5 second

10.Lighting pickaxe:hit entity to spawn lighting.
a.ligting effect: it work like wither, it applie when an enetity is struck by ligting
b.electric device:shock you and deals damge for a chance to get lighting when right click

Enjoy the mod
